message:
feat(update): implement changelog diff computation for multi-version updates

When an update spans multiple releases (e.g., 1.0.0 -> 1.3.0), users
previously only saw release notes for the latest version. This change
implements the compute_changelog_diff() function to aggregate release
notes from all intermediate versions.

Implementation details:
- Iterates through all releases between current (exclusive) and target (inclusive)
- Skips draft releases that shouldn't be shown to users
- Parses semver tags and filters to the relevant version range
- Aggregates release notes with version headers in chronological order
- Returns None if no intermediate releases have release notes

The changelog_diff field in UpdateCheck was previously stubbed with
"// TODO: Compute diff" - this fulfills that TODO.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
